docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,086.35 FILED BY LEIGH, ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT TINCUP, MATT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $20.00) SERVED FEB-18-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TINCUP, MATT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEIGH, ALEX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TINCUP, MATT $229.19 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $299.19, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN MAY 9, 2011, RETURN THE PLAINTIFF'S JACKET WITH LOGOS SEWN ONTO EACH SLEEVE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT TINCUP, MATT
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT TINCUP, MATT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TINCUP, MATT

REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $299.19 RE 28533 FOR TRANSACTION W0611518D007 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO ALEX LEIGH, DOC #1903761850, WARRANT #38200845, DATED JUN-20-2011
